subject: Fwd: (no subject)
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: ssulayem@aol.com
To: laiboon.yu@nakheel.ae
Sent: Fri, 21 Sep 2007 6:39 am
Subject: Fwd: (no subject)






er 

dear laiboon 

 comunicate with mr jefffrey epstein board member and investment
advisor to the wexner family 
 

-----Original Message----- 

From: ssulayem@aol.com 

To: jeeproject@yahoo.com 

Sent: Fri, 21 Sep 2007 6:33 am 

Subject: Re: (no subject) 
 

 

 


Dear Jeffrey  
 

please contact my cheif investment officer Dr YU Laibooon  

  
 

e mail : laiboon.yu@nakheel.com  
 

tel : 011 971506523372  

  

dear sultan 
 

we should move forward  . if you want I can speak  directly to your 

financial people. 
 

jeffrey
